beats.narration: Shipping in reverse. The replacement source lands on your dock, and the instant you sign, 10 CFR 20.1906 starts scripting your moves.

payload.title: THE LAST MILE IS YOURS
payload.sub: You sign — and a calibrated meter, not a signature, proves it arrived safe.

beats.narration: Receipt starts a clock. Monitor as soon as practicable — never past three hours during working hours, or three hours into the next working day.

tiles.s: The clock starts when you sign
If it lands during work hours

beats.narration: Then run the matrix. Survey radiation on any labeled package above a Type A quantity. Wipe for contamination unless it's special form or gas.

payload.heading: Run the monitoring matrix
payload.note: ABOVE TYPE A → SURVEY · NOT SPECIAL FORM → WIPE · DAMAGED → BOTH

beats.narration: Crushed, wet, or damaged cancels every exemption — do both. Over the transport limits, two hundred millirem an hour or four becquerels, and you notify immediately.
Once it passes, verify the contents against the papers, log every reading, and secure the source. A dock is unrestricted — never just parked.

payload.sub: Surveillance or locked away — the two-state rule the moment the carrier drives off.
